movie.title: Chatha Pacha: The Ring of Rowdies (2026) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Malayalam] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Chatha Pacha The Ring of Rowdies (2026) In the heart of Fort Kochi, three brothers and their crew of unlikely misfits stumble into the wild world of WWE-style costumed wrestling. What begins as a scrappy hustle soon explodes into a riot of masks, egos, and full-blown madness, all set against the backdrop of a city that never plays by the rules. But can their brotherhood survive when the real fight begins outside the ropes?
